fileSummaries.lib/rex-pricing-engine.ts: Core deterministic pricing engine for cut-to-size plastics. Calculates quotes without LLM arithmetic.
fileSummaries.lib/rex-knowledge.ts: Central Rex pricing and product knowledge base used for quoting and product/material logic.
fileSummaries.lib/rex-config.ts: Configuration layer for Rex behaviour and pricing rules.
fileSummaries.lib/rex-stats.ts: Rex analytics and performance tracking logic.
fileSummaries.lib/lex-knowledge.ts: Legal intake knowledge base for the Lex agent.
fileSummaries.lib/lex-tools.ts: Tools and helper functions for Lex workflows.
fileSummaries.lib/chat-prompt.ts: Core prompt structure used for chat agents.
fileSummaries.lib/pipedrive-client.ts: Handles CRM integration and lead capture.
fileSummaries.lib/woo-client.ts: WooCommerce integration for checkout and order creation.
fileSummaries.next.config.ts: Next.js configuration for build and deployment.
